fail_case: absorption_rate >= 0.3 OR saturation_state != 'fixpoint' OR any module < depth_min OR cross_run_mismatch

comment.absorption_rate_max: 0.3 cap — now derived from 1 - P(fixpoint); retained as legacy numeric cap
comment.saturation_required: legacy alias; true == saturation_state in pass_states. Authoritative field: saturation_policy
comment.saturation_policy: v2 master switch — promotes saturation from boolean to fixpoint/converging/open enum. mode=fixpoint_strict requires module_signature stability + invariant preservation (sigma*phi = n*tau = 24) across k_window consecutive DFS frames past depth_min, with diagonal_agreement >= diag_min.
comment.depth_min: 3 — DFS shallower than 3 levels cannot falsify deep structure; now justified as k_window(2) + 1 prefix step
comment.module_coverage: 5/5 — all 5 lenses must participate; predicate input to saturation_policy
comment.cross_run_consistency_required: true — drift/non-determinism detection gate (2026-04-21). Each seed runs TWICE with distinct random_state derived via hash(seed+run_tag); verdict emitted only when both runs' required_match_fields are identical. Rationale: single PASS can be coincidence; two matching PASSes under perturbed random_state witness true determinism. Gate impl: tool/drill_cross_run.hexa — runner internally invokes 2x and fails on any field diff. Test fixtures: DRILL_FIXTURE=det (pure hash oracle, 2 runs identical → PASS) vs DRILL_FIXTURE=nondet (oracle leaks random_state, 2 runs diverge → FAIL with diff_fields). NOT an LLM judge.
